expectations.text: The review identifies the comment naming buildProviders() or pkg/orchestrator/deploy.go as a dependency direction violation or architectural issue
expectations.evidence: Item 1: '[Important] server/handler.go:15-21 — Comment references external file... This couples the comment to an upstream location that may move, rename, or restructure.' Flags it as coupling/architectural issue. However, framed as 'bad comment' quality rather than explicitly naming the dependency-direction principle — passes the letter of the assertion.

expectations.text: The review explains that the comment couples downstream code to upstream implementation details that may change without notice
expectations.evidence: Item 1: 'Comments referencing specific external file paths and function names become stale silently and mislead future readers.' Captures the stale-coupling concern.

expectations.text: The review recommends rewriting the comment to use only concepts the current package owns
expectations.evidence: Item 1 recommendation: 'Describe the behavior and contract without citing a specific file path or function name.' Recommends using a ticket reference instead. Correct direction but lacks the explicit 'local concepts' framing.
